_meta.keyKnowledge: We design, modify and prototype user interfaces and user experiences for digital systems, then critically evaluate our alternatives.

_source.w: We design, modify and prototype user interfaces and user experiences for digital systems, then critically evaluate our alternatives.
y: Prototyping and critical evaluation are how professional designers create user-centred solutions.
Understanding the full UX design process — research, design, prototype, test, iterate — is a highly valued skill.
Critical evaluation ensures our designs genuinely serve users rather than just looking good.
eg: We create interactive prototypes that allow realistic user testing of our interface designs.
We apply UX design principles including accessibility, consistency and user feedback.
We conduct structured usability testing and analyse the results to inform design improvements.
We critically evaluate our design alternatives against user needs and design heuristics.
We iterate our designs through multiple rounds of testing and refinement.
We document our complete UX design process from research through to final design rationale.
